title: Godclaw mystery
summary: Godclaw oracles can mix obedience boons and gain armor command reroll and defense revelations.
disposition: Use for enemy preparation; do not give every Hellknight the package

title: Scrutinize Spell
summary: Adds Wisdom or Charisma to later Spellcraft identification checks after identifying a caster's class.
disposition: Select only if spell identification is limiting counterspells

title: Lead-lined room
summary: Blocks divinations when seamlessly closed but makes the room airtight.
disposition: Cheaper fallback with ventilation and portal constraints

title: Secrecy runes
summary: Blocks sound and divinations up to a selected spell level even with portals open.
disposition: Leading war-room model; audit mythic divine and artifact exceptions

title: Masked persona
summary: Creates a consistent alternate identity with divination and reputation separation after establishment.
disposition: Adopt only if GM uses the general subsystem

title: Convincing Persona
summary: Improves Bluff and Disguise and prevents ordinary public compromise.
disposition: Strong if masked personas are active

title: Masked Symbol
summary: Adds a concept-based social leadership stealth or disguise benefit.
disposition: Choose only for a maintained persona

title: Assumed likeness
summary: Emotion-based phantasm disguises the caster differently to each target and supports social checks.

title: Underwater spell adjudications
summary: Clarifies breath verbal components weather cold fire electricity invisibility and perception underwater.

title: Invisibility bubble
summary: Conceals both the target and displaced water underwater.
disposition: Audit bard access and CR-09 access

title: Pressure adaptation and stabilization
summary: Reduces or immediately resolves depth-pressure adaptation.

title: Aquachymist underwater bombs
summary: Allows bombs to function underwater and controls their buoyancy.
disposition: Do not combine with gun chemist before archetype compatibility audit

title: Planefarer's band
summary: Provides one Elemental Plane's movement or survival benefits.
disposition: Mission item only; ring-slot and plane limits

title: Janni's jaunt
summary: Restricted plane shift for willing targets among Material Astral and Elemental Planes.
disposition: Fallback only; Key of Daedalus usually superior

title: Divine rank domain-count framework
summary: Uses five domains and six subdomains for deities and four each for demigods.
disposition: Balancing reference only; never overwrite Zatera rules
